subcategory: navigation menu item with text reveal animation
use_cases: Navigation menu items with animated text hover effects
Interactive links with character-by-character slide reveal on hover
Modern navigation bars requiring subtle motion interactions
Portfolio or creative websites with animated navigation
Landing page menus with premium micro-interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist navigation menu item component featuring character-by-character text animation on hover. Each letter slides up while a new character slides in from below, creating a smooth reveal effect with configurable timing. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and supports center or left-aligned stagger timing. Ideal for modern SaaS dashboards, dev tools interfaces, and creative portfolios requiring polished hover interactions.
